name: 9001app-v2
description: Sistema de Gestión de Calidad ISO 9001:2015 con migración a MongoDB Atlas y sistema de agentes inteligentes

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../agent-coordinator && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run setup:mongodb && npm run setup:agents
scripts.migrate: npm run migrate:schemas && npm run migrate:data
scripts.validate: npm run validate:migration && npm run validate:system
scripts.docs:generate: npm run docs:api && npm run docs:migration && npm run docs:agents && npm run docs:superadmin
scripts.docs:update: npm run docs:generate && npm run docs:validate
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.monitor: npm run monitor:system && npm run monitor:agents
scripts.clean: npm run clean:node_modules && npm run clean:build && npm run clean:logs
scripts.clean:node_modules: rm -rf node_modules && cd backend && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../frontend && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../agent-coordinator && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.clean:build: rm -rf dist && cd backend && rm -rf dist && cd ../frontend && rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:logs: rm -rf logs && cd agent-coordinator && rm -rf logs
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run install:all && npm run setup
scripts.update: npm run update:dependencies && npm run update:docs
scripts.update:dependencies: npm update && cd backend && npm update && cd ../frontend && npm update && cd ../agent-coordinator && npm update
scripts.report: npm run report:coverage && npm run report:performance && npm run report:security

author: Sergio Charata
